headline: Forget Coca-Cola, Choose Duke Energy
summary: Coca-Cola (NYSE:KO) is the defensive name every retirement account seems to want to own right now, rallying 20.26% year to date on consistent earnings beats and a flight to quality inside consumer staples. Yet the multiple has run ahead of the fundamentals, and there is a better regulated alternative hiding in plain sight. Coca-Cola Is ... Forget Coca-Cola, Choose Duke Energy

headline: Duke Energy to announce second-quarter 2026 financial results on Aug. 4
summary: Duke Energy will post its second-quarter 2026 financial results at 7 a.m. ET on Tuesday, Aug. 4, on the company's website at duke-energy.com/investors.

headline: A $750,000 Portfolio That Can Reliably Produce $4,000 a Month
summary: A $750,000 portfolio and a $4,000 monthly income target look like a clean equation, and they are: $48,000 divided by $750,000 equals 6.4%. The trick is that 6.4% is an awkward number. It sits above what most regulated utilities pay and below what a pure business development company portfolio might offer. Hitting it reliably means ... A $750,000 Portfolio That Can Reliably Produce $4,000 a Month

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Utilities Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: In uncertain markets, investors turn to dividend-yielding stocks. Benzinga offers latest analyst ratings & news for high-yield stocks in utilities sector.
